title: Headset version is changed
scenario: Firmware version not updated on Lens tenant inventory and device profile pages after DFU via mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Ensure the headset is connected and registered to a Lens tenant.
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
4. Check the current firmware version displayed in Device Settings.
5. Initiate a firmware update (DFU) from the app.
6. Wait for the firmware update to complete successfully.
7. After the update, verify the new firmware version is displayed in the app under Device Settings.
8. Log in to the Lens tenant's admin portal.
9. Navigate to the Inventory page and verify the headset's firmware version is updated.
10. Navigate to the Device profile page for the headset and verify the firmware version is updated.
11. Navigate to the Device user / Mobile user page and verify the firmware version is updated.
expected: The new headset firmware version is correctly reflected on the Lens tenant's Inventory page, Device profile page, and Device user/Mobile user page after the DFU.
